Collect stamps in Weekly Event for rewards!

==How to Get==
Stamps will be cleared at the end of this event!
*Per {{RewardIconWithText|Spirit Crystal}} obtained, {{RewardIconWithLink|Weekly Special Stamp}} +1
*Per {{RewardIconWithText|Carnival Balloon}} obtained, {{RewardIconWithLink|Weekly Special Stamp}} +1
*Per {{RewardIconWithText|Mystery Ash}} obtained, {{RewardIconWithLink|Weekly Special Stamp}} +1

==Special Reward==
Basic is free, Ultimate is $14.99

{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible"
!{{RewardIconWithLink|Weekly Special Stamp}}s
!Basic
!Ultimate
|-
|999 
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +200}}
|-
|1,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Chest, +100}}
|Police Chan-hee(Avatar)<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +5|orange}}
|-
|2,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Chest, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +2|orange}}
|-
|3,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Chest, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +8h}}
|-
|3,999
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +200}}
|-
|4,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Chest, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Relic RF, +10|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +5|orange}}
|-
|5,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Chest, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +2|orange}}
|-
|6,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Chest, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +8h}}
|-
|6,999
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +200}}
|-
|7,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Chest, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +1|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +5|orange}}
|-
|8,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Chest, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +2|orange}}
|-
|9,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Chest, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +8h}}
|-
|9,999
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +200}}
|-
|10,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Chest, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Relic RF, +20|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +5|orange}}
|-
|11,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Chest, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +2|orange}}
|-
|12,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Chest, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +8h}}
|-
|12,999
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +200}}
|-
|13,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Chest, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +1|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +5|orange}}
|-
|14,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Chest, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +2|orange}}
|-
|15,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nebula Chest, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +8h}}
|-
|15,999
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +100}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +200}}
|-
|16,000
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +1|orange}}
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Kepler Telescope|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +5|orange}}
|}
